name: Website Uptime Monitor
description: Monitors a list of website URLs for uptime, checks SSL certificate expiry and response time, and emails a summary report when a site is down or a certificate is expiring soon.

form_fields.label: Target URLs
form_fields.description: One URL per line to monitor

form_fields.label: SSL Expiry Warning (days)
form_fields.description: Warn when a certificate expires within this many days

form_fields.label: SMTP Host
form_fields.description: SMTP server for sending the summary email

form_fields.label: Alert Recipient
form_fields.description: Where to send the summary report

form_fields.label: Report Format
form_fields.description: Format for the final output report

form_fields.label: Report Output Directory
form_fields.description: Directory where the final report will be saved

skills.name: Load Monitor Targets
skills.description: Read and validate the list of target URLs and monitoring thresholds from config.

skills.name: Probe Uptime And Latency
skills.description: Send HTTP requests to each target, recording status code and response time.

skills.name: Inspect SSL Certificates
skills.description: Check each HTTPS target's certificate expiry against the warning threshold.

skills.name: Evaluate Alerts
skills.description: Combine uptime and SSL results and decide which issues warrant an alert.

skills.name: Send Email Summary
skills.description: Email the alert summary to the recipient via SMTP.

skills.name: Generate Monitoring Report
skills.description: Render the full monitoring run as a report in the chosen format and save it.
